'''Thani''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital city]] of [[Telos IV]]. The [[Chodo Habat Parkway]] and [[Thani Terminal]] were located in it.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi — The Dark Side 1|''Jedi — The Dark Side'' 1]]
*[[Jedi — The Dark Side 2|''Jedi — The Dark Side'' 2]]
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-08-19 -->''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''
